_doc: Structural baselines for the CLI build. Used by test/e2e/baseline.test.ts to detect bundle bloat during refactors. Refresh with `pnpm --filter @bike4mind/cli build && node packages/cli/test/scripts/refresh-baseline.mjs` after intentional size changes.

tolerance._doc: Test fails if growth exceeds totalGrowthFraction OR fileCount delta exceeds fileCountDelta. Pick numbers that catch a regression but absorb compiler/dependency drift.
